title: Second-Year-Ukrainian
catalogDescription: Continuation of UKR 405. Reinforces basic grasp of language and enlarges both vocabulary and command of grammatical patterns. Prerequisite: minimum grade of 2.0 in UKR 405 Offered: Sp.
prerequisiteNotes: Official UW prerequisite text: minimum grade of 2.0 in UKR 405
prerequisite text is preserved as a note until a parser can safely normalize AND/OR/minimum-grade semantics into graph prerequisites.

title: Literature, Film, and Culture of Ukraine
catalogDescription: Representative prose works by leading Ukrainian authors. Shows originality of Ukrainian literature through acquaintance with the peculiar historical and political situation of Ukraine. Offered in English.
